{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1967},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401209652878361406","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好啊。目前来看没有毒，这是真的杀伐果断。舍弃很多小说推进剧情的那一套，敢来惹我直接灵魂血肉骨骼一波顷刻炼化[注意]。主角日常在第五层。期待末日世界跟万族的剧情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723235150,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有个人特色，这是一个小白","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/RzatZ+31L4ZM0PKEMFGW2ne31QwRGQ7UlEYPlvJbTu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/84e4de29cbb54051a469aeb4ca40979b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703347&x-signature=x%2Ffed5DGt2BxAVKgLGCkehPIuTA%3D","user_id":"1561780627965405","user_name":"jile"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1561780627965405","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】
【腐泥怪】——【憎恶巨人】——【燃血圣徒】
【小冰龙】——【霜寒领主】——【霜耀骨龙】
【引魂幡】——【招魂幡】——【人皇旗】
钱尔穿越御兽世界，成了一个黑暗系御兽师，可因为没有资源而进境困难。
幸好觉醒末世双穿门，可以穿越到末世世界中用丧尸血肉喂养血肉系御兽，骨骼喂养骷髅系御兽，灵魂喂养亡魂系御兽。
最重要的是末世收割丧尸居然还会产生功德。
一众黑暗系御兽师看着钱尔身后人头滚滚，但却没有丝毫鬼气反而金光护体的御兽人皇旗陷入沉思。
这东西……怎么这么像万魂幡啊？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e2af18ca8720ba0ecb7d019daf300223","author":"九十七","author_id":"","book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_name":"末世御兽：主打一个不浪费","book_short_name":"末日御兽","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7355403411136725528","read_count":"31947","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1345888"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"655","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,末世,宠物","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/64ec9ad3fb8d084fee3f6459b8a817b4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310574&x-signature=nEyqcsG4nXI5sZZUBxoehM%2FDK2c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1107947579249796","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"187"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5806,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28598,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7266},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7406892175239725849","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，主角作为一个从末世回来的人，性格很真实。而且没有那种看着不爽的憋屈情节，主角一直都有仇报仇，斩草除根。后面这个过去与未来的设定也很有意思，希望作者能够越写越好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724553803,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5wdF0scXVNl1wR/zNSLrpgSSu7T/8mZE0CUULySbVVv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/beac0500245d4fc99db7279b70a316bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709855&x-signature=CmRHUhT3Bq0%2Bc3UtpSA%2FKYmdMq0%3D","user_id":"2419340200389115","user_name":"月色初晨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2419340200389115","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1700318331,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】

":"7453841995021632281","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"直白点写的一般，但是节奏快，整体情节也没有太大的脱离，所以评分不错。
我觉得最大的问题不是主角升级快，而是人类的真实实力。看下来的感觉：人类应该是第一大胜利种族，其他的都是弟弟。不论是对后代的培养（其他族群简直是天真无邪，各族之间都是竞争关系，长辈也耳提面命却依旧敢相信人类是好人，最后年轻一代几乎被屠杀殆尽），还是人类的实力（除了内乱，剩下几大族群联合都干不过人类，还附带伤亡，人类毫发无伤），还不如直接以人类统治了全球为开局写呢[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735486907,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny8PrshiJyQBv+MpjAi44SQiKI8/btFvwJ0SEz6ML0wJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2535929868984781","user_name":"辽东的古立特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2535929868984781","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】

d":"7582033796180296510","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无女主无暧昧，主打一个爽文，杀伐果断，有人今天要杀主角，那只要主角等级提升一个等级就去杀他们，直到全部杀死，没有那种憋屈几十上百章，那敌人还弄不死，跟御兽之间相处也很温馨，是那种家人伙伴间的相处，并不是工具，主角会用相机记录自己御兽的破壳升级进化，会记得自己御兽的生日，给自己御兽过生日，总之很不错，两个世界过去未来双胞胎的设定也很不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765333225,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1/8RkYI8o6zG4Ej/gOHFmE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"100721701382","user_name":"用户名77185678"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100721701382","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】
【腐泥怪】——【憎恶巨人】——【燃血圣徒】
【小冰龙】——【霜寒领主】——【霜耀骨龙】
【引魂幡】——【招魂幡】——【人皇旗】
钱尔穿越御兽世界，成了一个黑暗系御兽师，可因为没有资源而进境困难。
幸好觉醒末世双穿门，可以穿越到末世世界中用丧尸血肉喂养血肉系御兽，骨骼喂养骷髅系御兽，灵魂喂养亡魂系御兽。
最重要的是末世收割丧尸居然还会产生功德。
一众黑暗系御兽师看着钱尔身后人头滚滚，但却没有丝毫鬼气反而金光护体的御兽人皇旗陷入沉思。

_id":"7466812224998048536","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体是好看的，无女主，也没有啥暧昧对象，我是偏后宫党，但观感还好
设定引用了宝可梦的部分设定，种族值、准神、多段金华这些，原创部分比较多，观感不会很缝合
总体是带逻辑的爽文，看多了人族弱势的文，这本看着还挺爽的后期描写上
有几点瑕疵，末世世界和御兽世界的关系，这个没有写的很好，还有小六外挂那个骨头的获取那段，追更看的比较难受
总体好评吧，感觉快到收尾阶段了，希望别搞跳世界这种路数就行"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738505714,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"忘不掉一阵风吹过樱花树，那时树下有我也有你","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4zHfzmBXNBTqkpN6bXMkbQeZLJgbcHbiWT0yTmkKy7M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/47ba6633fbb74407b830b2c9e5140309~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703011&x-signature=FFQ4F47gayouDd1ZFut8j6gN1bw%3D","user_id":"3702801069252904","user_name":"李慕白417"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3702801069252904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】
【腐泥怪】——【憎恶巨人】——【燃血圣徒】
【小冰龙】——【霜寒领主】——【霜耀骨龙】
【引魂幡】——【招魂幡】——【人皇旗】
钱尔穿越御兽世界，成了一个黑暗系御兽师，可因为没有资源而进境困难。
幸好觉醒末世双穿门，可以穿越到末世世界中用丧尸血肉喂养血肉系御兽，骨骼喂养骷髅系御兽，灵魂喂养亡魂系御兽。
最重要的是末世收割丧尸居然还会产生功德。
一众黑暗系御兽师看着钱尔身后人头滚滚，但却没有丝毫鬼气反而金光护体的御兽人皇旗陷入沉思。

_id":"7393732255163925273","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看！！！大家都很正常，官方也很正常，有对天才的正常待遇和态度，最最重要的是目前无女主无暧昧，没有恶心的擦边写法，没有小姨姐姐妹妹刁蛮大小姐。主角好帅！下黑手快准狠，没有什么怜香惜玉，符合末世人设，超好看！4个御兽也很可爱，性格各异，但是都很懂事。希望跪求最后都没有女主没有感情戏，已经被恶心怕了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721490095,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界奔流不息，而我咸鱼躺平。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6bykXHQ4vhlCP+/NZGJHSA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/becf04a499b841b6a390350228fa76b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701911&x-signature=VCf0ng7hVSz9Hcm1rKa3hJslbKA%3D","user_id":"932856813073021","user_name":"怀瑾握瑜☆⁠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"932856813073021","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】
